title: Notifications - Device disconnected
scenario: Tapping "Device is disconnected" notification redirects to Poly Lens app Home Screen showing the disconnected device
steps: 1. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app and ensure a Bluetooth audio device is paired and connected.
2. Press the Home button or switch to another app to send the Poly Studio Mobile app to the background.
3. Disconnect the paired device (e.g., turn off the device, move out of range, or press the Bluetooth button to disconnect).
4. Observe the notification area for a "Device is disconnected" notification.
expected: A "Device is disconnected" notification appears. Tapping the notification redirects the user to the Poly Studio Mobile app Home Screen showing the disconnected device.
